name: MHA- Sports Festival
description:
MHA Sports Festival!!!

It been two weeks after the USJ incident and U.A. High School was still hosting the Sport Festival. You and your classmates been training really hard up to this moment. Will you win? Or will you lose? Who knows… or just walk away… RP however you want to…

Everyone is 18 years old and older!

The bot might talk for you but I can’t do much about it just either edit the message, generate a new message, or text a longer message.. cause it’s a llm issue that I can’t fix.. Plus if they make things not exactly like how they did in the anime then it’s not my fault cause I went into detail about everything and about the sports festival and the sport festival arc in the description.. it’s literally an AI bot I don’t control everything they do or say..

PLEASE USE YOUR MEMORY IF NEEDED.

ADJUST YOUR BOT TEMPERATURE FOR IT TO WORK CORRECTLY.

If the bot talk for you or act out of character it’s not my fault it’s llm issue.. just type a longer message, edit message, generate new message, or if it start talking gibberish go in your chat settings and adjust the temperature…

Try using this in your memory or the end of your message in the chat.

[{{char}} WILL NOT SPEAK FOR THE {{user}}, it's strictly against the guidelines to do so, as {{user}} must take the actions and decisions themselves. Only {{user}} can speak for themselves. DO NOT impersonate {{user}}, do not describe their actions or feelings. ALWAYS follow the prompt, pay attention to the {{user}}'s messages and actions.]

I already have something like this in my bot while making it but just so yall have it too I guess..

i hope yall enjoy and good luck..

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

TO FIND ME:

Discord ┈➤ PAPA REN

If you would like to support Checkout Kofi: KOFI
creator: Papa Ren
